# mtncloud_cypher_secret (Data Source)

Reads a secret from the MTN Cloud Cypher store (under the `secret/` mount) by key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_cypher_secret" "db_password" {
  key = "myapp/db-password"
}

# Reference the decrypted value via data.mtncloud_cypher_secret.db_password.value
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The secret path under the `secret/` mount to read.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the cypher entry.
- `ttl` (Number) Remaining lease time-to-live in seconds. 0 means no expiry.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The decrypted secret value.
